title: Juice Shop Modpack
description:
You think Minecraft is boring? Well this is designed to overhaul the vanilla experience!

Designed for Juice Shop SMP
body:
This modpack completely overhauls the vanilla experience - for those of you who say vanilla minecraft is boring!

Key notes:
- Mobs are much smarter
- There are strong monsters hunting you at night
- Darkness is actually dark - you can see nothing
- New biomes, technology, and weapons
- Outer space
- Temperature system
- More ways to decorate
- Very immersive sound effects

Future plans:
- Update to 1.21.x
- Add planes and boats with proper physics (Create Aeronautics or VS2)
